items.name: Staff of Sparks
items.description: This staff shoots mini ball-lightnings.

items.name: Tri-Laser 333
items.description: Does exactly what the name says - shoots three lasers.

items.name: Christmas Tree Launcher
items.description: Launch miniature Christmas trees, and watch as they instantly become full size!

items.name: Golden Magic Carpet
items.description: Ride your own golden carpet through the skies of Roblox! Use the 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' or arrow keys to control the direction. A magical golden trail will track your path through the sky.

items.name: Fire Extinguisher
items.description: This fire is out of control.  Gonna burn this city.  Burn this city.

items.name: Ro-torcycle
items.description: Ride around ROBLOX on your tricked out Ro-torcycle.  Features dynamically lit headlight and sweet rotating wheels.

items.name: Sword of the Eternal Abyss
items.description: Click to slash and double click to lunge. Each hit will do 20-26 points of damage. Hit the 'Q' key to activate this item's special attack.

items.name: Pizza Delivery Vehicle
items.description: Cruise around ROBLOX in your sweet pizza delivery vehicle.  Click 'X' to turn on your headlights and 'H' to honk.

items.name: Laser Electrocutor
items.description: Don't laser electrocute me bro!

items.name: Heartbreaker
items.description: "You're a heart breaker / dream maker, love taker / Don't you mess around with me!"

items.name: Firebrand
items.description: "O! for a muse of fire, that would ascend the brightest heaven of invention."

items.name: Sword Cane
items.description: At first glance you look like an innocent person who has some difficulty walking - but then, bam!  It's a sword and you're slashing left and right.

items.name: Festive Periastron Chi
items.description: The Sword men use to fight rabid reindeer... in space.

items.name: Blue Fidget Spinner
items.description: True blue, too cool. The fidget spinner will spin when you click on it and each time you click on it, the faster it will spin.

items.name: Azure Dragon's Magic Slayer
items.description: Click to deal your foes 16 to 22 points of damage.  If you successfully blox your foe, they become a  skeleton! Click and hold to charge a special attack which creates a magic purple portal in front of you. It'll then suck in objects and players and instantly kill them if they come in contact with it!

items.name: Mythic Sword of the Tides
items.description: Time and tides wait for no man. Slash at your enemies, dealing 15 to 22 damage. Water splashes on the sword each time you swing. Double click to dash forward, dealing 25% more damage, increasing the maximum possible damage cap to 33. Hit the 'Q' key to activate its special, which creates 12 deadly waves around you in a circle, which rise from the ground.

items.name: Skeleton King's Sword
items.description: This sword features three unique swings and a spin move (tap “W” twice and left-click), each of which has a 20% chance of cracking an enemy’s joints. As if that wasn’t enough, each attack has a 22% chance of being critical (2.25x damage). Normal attacks do 25 damage, landing critical attacks at about 56. Bone has never been so dangerous.

items.name: Fencing Foil
items.description: En garde! This sword is very quick. It does high lunging damage but very low slashing damage.

items.name: RC Tank
items.description: This remote control tank comes equipped with real explosives!  Drive around and blow things up.  Your foes will never see you coming!

items.name: Double Cheezburger
items.description: U can has double cheezburger!

items.name: Golden Rolling Hoverboard
items.description: Nothing says sophistication like solid gold. Control your direction using arrow keys or the 'W', 'A', 'S', and 'D' keys. Hit Backspace to dismount.

items.name: Rock Thunder
items.description: Your guitar has the lightning, now it's time to bring the thunder! You're gonna rock this stage. Change the chord using the keys, 'Z', 'X', 'C', 'V', 'B', 'N', 'M'. Alter the pitch using the keys 'G', 'H', 'J', 'K', 'L'. Hold shift to sharpen the chords. Complete the synchronized pattern of notes special (hit the ctrl key to begin) with at least 75% accuracy to shoot out non-lethal blue lightning.

items.name: Razevenge
items.description: Razevenge is a dish best served cold.

items.name: Ninja Jump Potion
items.description: Do some sweet ninja jumping with this ninja potion!

items.name: War Rocks
items.description: Has anyone ever read The Lottery by Shirley Jackson? It's hugely overrated.

items.name: Korblox Deathspeaker's Spell Book
items.description: Cast one of three dangerous spells at your enemies - the Knights of Redcliff!

items.name: Merely's Sparkle Time Hoverboard
items.description: Hover over the skies and speed over your challengers, sparkling all the way.

items.name: Epic Duck Roped
items.description: The silliest Ro Ped yet!  Hit the 'H' key to make it quack!  Hit 'Q' to make it rain ducks.

items.name: Poseidon's Quake Trident
items.description: Shake the land and sea with Poseidon's Quake Trident!

items.name: Wild West Sarsaparilla
items.description: This here sarsaparilla will make you the fastest draw in the West!
